steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank is the object of the participle Assembling in a participial phrase. The sentence describes an artist working with collage-based paintings (plural).

steps.title: Apply pronoun reference and number agreement
steps.content:
The pronoun must refer to a clear antecedent and match its number. Them correctly refers to the plural paintings she assembles.

The other three fail: her refers to the artist, it is singular when a plural noun is required, and that lacks a clear referent.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
